headlines: Morgan Stanley moves closer to a U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF (MSBT)
CoinShares lists on Nasdaq after $1.2B Vine Hill deal
Tether hires KPMG for first full financial audit
Stablecoin market tops $317B with $1.24B weekly inflows
KuCoin agrees to $500K CFTC settlement and U.S. access injunction

articles.title: Morgan Stanley moves closer to a U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF (MSBT)
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley filed Amendment No. 4 to its S-1 for the proposed Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (ticker: MSBT), updating custody, listing and fee details and signalling the product is near launch. The filing names BNY Mellon and Coinbase Custody and lists a low management fee that will intensify competition in U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs. (Filed April 1, 2026.)

articles.title: CoinShares lists on Nasdaq after $1.2B Vine Hill deal
articles.summary: Europe’s largest digital-asset manager CoinShares began trading on Nasdaq under ticker CSHR after a $1.2 billion combination with Vine Hill. The U.S. listing marks stronger institutional footing for crypto investment firms and could boost demand for crypto ETPs and related products. (Announced April 1, 2026.)

articles.title: Tether hires KPMG for first full USDT financial audit
articles.summary: Tether has engaged KPMG to perform its first full financial-statement audit of USDT reserves and brought in PwC to upgrade internal controls, a move aimed at boosting transparency ahead of U.S. expansion plans. This is the biggest audit development for the world’s largest stablecoin in years. (Reported March 26–27, 2026.)

articles.title: Stablecoin market tops $317B with $1.24B weekly inflows
articles.summary: The dollar‑pegged stablecoin sector crossed about $317 billion in market value after recording roughly $1.24 billion of inflows over the prior week. Tether remains the largest issuer, and strong inflows indicate continued demand for on‑chain dollar liquidity. (Data snapshot Apr 4, 2026.)

articles.title: KuCoin agrees to $500K CFTC settlement; U.S. access barred without registration
articles.summary: A U.S. federal court entered a consent order requiring Peken Global (operator of KuCoin) to pay $500,000 to settle CFTC claims that it ran an unregistered offshore commodities exchange. The order also permanently bars allowing U.S. persons to trade on the platform unless it registers with the CFTC as a foreign board of trade. (Consent order entered Mar 30–31, 2026.)

articles.title: Q1 derivatives volume soars to $18.6T; Binance still leads derivatives market
articles.summary: CoinGlass data show crypto derivatives trading totaled roughly $18.6 trillion in Q1 2026, with Binance leading the quarter (about $4.9 trillion). The report highlights the dominance of derivatives vs. spot markets and growing activity on perp DEXs. (CoinGlass/Cointelegraph report, Apr 3, 2026.)

articles.title: Metaplanet buys 5,075 BTC in Q1 to become the 3rd‑largest public Bitcoin treasury
articles.summary: Tokyo‑listed Metaplanet disclosed it acquired 5,075 BTC (~$405M) in Q1 2026 and now holds about 40,177 BTC, making it the third‑largest publicly listed corporate Bitcoin treasury. The move shows companies still use BTC as a treasury asset despite recent market turbulence. (Filed Apr 2, 2026.)

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation stakes ~45,000 ETH in April deposit, nears 70,000 ETH goal
articles.summary: The Ethereum Foundation staked roughly 45,034 ETH on April 3, 2026, bringing its cumulative stake close to a 70,000 ETH target. The deposit shows continued protocol support and reduces liquid supply ahead of any price moves tied to staking flows. (Reported Apr 3–4, 2026.)
